creator: void@f-m.fm
text:
Created attachment 240400
poudriere build log

Hello,

This is on a brand new 13.2 poudriere jail on amd64 with minimal jailname-make.conf and 
latest portstree fetched around 2320 UTC on 24th Feb. Attached is the log of the build.

java/openjdk8 fails to build in poudriere-devel in configure here:

###

[00:00:30] checking whether to build JFR... true
